subcommands.name: nest new
subcommands.description: Scaffolds a new NestJS project with a standard directory structure and configuration.

options.name: --directory
options.description: Specify the destination directory

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Report actions that would be taken without writing out results

options.name: --skip-git
options.description: Skip git repository initialization

options.name: --skip-install
options.description: Skip package installation

options.name: --package-manager
options.description: Specify package manager (npm, yarn, pnpm)

options.name: --language
options.description: Programming language (TypeScript or JavaScript)

options.name: --strict
options.description: Enable strict mode in TypeScript configuration

subcommands.name: nest generate controller
subcommands.description: Generates a new NestJS controller class with route handling boilerplate.

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Report actions without writing out results

options.name: --flat
options.description: Do not generate a dedicated directory

options.name: --no-spec
options.description: Do not generate spec (test) file

options.name: --skip-import
options.description: Skip importing into the declaring module

subcommands.name: nest generate resource
subcommands.description: Generates a complete CRUD resource with module, controller, service, DTOs, and entities.

options.description: Report actions without writing out results

options.name: --no-spec
options.description: Do not generate spec files

options.name: --type
options.description: Transport layer: REST API, GraphQL (code first), GraphQL (schema first), Microservice, WebSockets

subcommands.name: nest build
subcommands.description: Compiles the NestJS application using the TypeScript compiler or webpack.

options.name: --config
options.description: Path to nest-cli.json configuration file

options.name: --path
options.description: Path to tsconfig.json

options.name: --watch
options.description: Run in watch mode (live-reload)

options.name: --webpack
options.description: Use webpack for compilation

options.name: --webpackPath
options.description: Path to webpack configuration

options.name: --tsc
options.description: Force use of tsc for compilation

subcommands.name: nest start
subcommands.description: Compiles and runs the NestJS application.

options.name: --config
options.description: Path to nest-cli.json configuration file

options.name: --path
options.description: Path to tsconfig.json

options.name: --watch
options.description: Run in watch mode (live-reload)

options.name: --debug
options.description: Run in debug mode (--inspect flag)

options.name: --exec
options.description: Specify the binary to run (default: node)

options.name: --preserveWatchOutput
options.description: Keep outdated console output in watch mode

subcommands.name: nest info
subcommands.description: Displays information about the installed NestJS packages and system environment.

subcommands.name: nest add
subcommands.description: Adds a NestJS library or schematic package to the project.

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Report actions without writing out results

options.name: --skip-install
options.description: Skip package installation

subcommands.name: npm run start:dev
subcommands.description: Starts the NestJS application in development mode with hot-reload (nest start --watch).

subcommands.name: npm run start:debug
subcommands.description: Starts the NestJS application in debug mode with watch (nest start --debug --watch).

subcommands.name: npm run start:prod
subcommands.description: Starts the compiled production application (node dist/main).

subcommands.name: npm run build
subcommands.description: Builds the NestJS application for production.

subcommands.name: npm run test
subcommands.description: Runs unit tests using Jest.

subcommands.name: npm run test:e2e
subcommands.description: Runs end-to-end tests using Jest with the e2e configuration.

subcommands.name: npm run test:cov
subcommands.description: Runs unit tests with code coverage reporting.

subcommands.name: npm run lint
subcommands.description: Runs ESLint to lint TypeScript source files.

subcommands.name: npx prisma init
subcommands.description: Initializes a new Prisma project with a schema file and .env file.

options.name: --datasource-provider
options.description: Database provider: postgresql, mysql, sqlite, sqlserver, mongodb, cockroachdb

subcommands.name: npx prisma migrate dev
subcommands.description: Creates and applies database migrations in development.

options.name: --name
options.description: Name the migration

options.name: --create-only
options.description: Create migration file only without applying

subcommands.name: npx prisma generate
subcommands.description: Generates the Prisma Client based on the schema.

subcommands.name: npx prisma db push
subcommands.description: Pushes the Prisma schema state to the database without creating migrations.

options.name: --force-reset
options.description: Force reset the database

subcommands.name: npx prisma studio
subcommands.description: Opens Prisma Studio, a visual editor for your database data.

options.name: --port
options.description: Port to start Prisma Studio on

subcommands.name: npx typeorm migration:create
subcommands.description: Creates a new empty TypeORM migration file.

options.name: -n
options.description: Name of the migration

subcommands.name: npx typeorm migration:generate
subcommands.description: Generates a TypeORM migration based on entity changes.

options.name: -n
options.description: Name of the migration

options.name: -d
options.description: Path to data source

subcommands.name: npx typeorm migration:run
subcommands.description: Runs all pending TypeORM migrations.

options.name: -d
options.description: Path to data source

subcommands.name: npx typeorm migration:revert
subcommands.description: Reverts the last executed TypeORM migration.

options.name: -d
options.description: Path to data source
